title: NBT Copy
description: Adds copy button for the "/data get" command output
body:
## About
**NBT Copy** is a small mod adding copy button for the `/data get` command output.

It's a server-side mod, so to work with `/data get` on multiplayer it needs to be installed on the server, but it also works with [clientcommands](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-commands) `/cgetdata` on the client-side.

## Example

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XIIGRXeq/images/6d4bffb2ce1889afd93abf3e04ba6f016078fd11.png)
